subcodes.first_line: And concerning what was asked about the Most Great Festival, its commencement is after the passing of thirty-two days from the Festival of Fasting... they had written that together with several souls, after their attention, they were forbidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اینکه از عید اعظم سؤال شده بود اول آن بعد از انقضای سی و دو ٣٢ یوم از عید صیامست ... مرقوم فرموده بودند مع چند نفس بعد از توجه ممنوع شده
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @laws of marriage and dowry
